title: persistent launcher log
description: Add a bounded, best-effort, durable launcher log behind the mk-spec-memory launcher's log(): each logged line is also appended (timestamped + pid-stamped) to a size-capped file that rotates to a single .prev.log generation, so daemon flaps and owner-disposal races are attributable from disk instead of only from stderr the MCP host may drop. Default-on, db-dir path (gitignored by *.log), operator-controllable via SPECKIT_LAUNCHER_LOG / _PATH / _MAX_BYTES. First of the deferred daemon-reliability hardening items from phase 017.
